examples: At 66, she was as feisty as ever.
Regulators would not just have to deal with a feisty outfit. They would have to cope with one of the world's biggest, pushiest media companies.
Ms. Prose depicts Lula as a feisty but daydreamy sort of girl.
That would be credible if the media giant had a feisty and independent-minded board.
Thousands of feisty letters to Congress were angrily typed and sent and sent again.
